institution.name: Great Falls College Montana State University

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Great Falls College Montana State University rose 40% between 2008 and 2011 ($7.1k → $10.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Great Falls College Montana State University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.8k → $12.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Great Falls College Montana State University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.5k → $4.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Great Falls College Montana State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).
